Footer.aboutDesc: ORION GLOBAL is a dynamic international logistics and trading company. We deliver trusted solutions for vehicle, machinery, and equipment exports worldwide.

Home.heroSubtitle: Your trusted global partner for vehicles, trucks, bikes, machinery and heavy equipment export, import, vanning and shipping services.
Home.aboutDesc1: Established in 2020, ORION GLOBAL has grown into a leading international trading and logistics company. We specialize in handling complex shipping requirements for heavy vehicles, machinery, and commercial cargo.
Home.aboutDesc2: Our dedication to professional service, in-house vanning expertise, and robust shipping networks ensures your cargo reaches its destination safely and on schedule.
Home.servicesSubtitle: We provide end-to-end global trade support, logistics handling, and secure transportation.
Home.productsSubtitle: We specialize in the export, import, and secure transport of a wide range of vehicles and industrial machinery.
Home.strengthsSubtitle: Built on values of trust, reliability, and technical expertise in international logistics.
Home.ctaText: Ready to secure your cargo shipment or discuss importing quality materials? Get in touch with our international trading specialists today.

About.title: About Us
About.subtitle: Connecting global markets with safety, speed, and integrity.
About.businessTypeDesc: International Trade, Logistics, Vanning, Ocean Freight & Customs Clearance Support
About.valuesSubtitle: The principles that guide our business operations every single day.
About.value1Desc: We do business with honesty, transparency, and high ethical standards.
About.value2Desc: We deliver the best quality products, securing, and transport solutions.
About.value3Desc: We keep our promises, respect schedules, and ensure safe delivery.
About.value4Desc: Your satisfaction and business success are our ultimate priorities.
About.value5Desc: We build long-term relationships and grow together with our partners.
About.brandConceptDesc: At ORION GLOBAL, this tagline is our promise. In every transaction, we dedicate ourselves to improving safety, reducing shipping bottlenecks, and building greater outcomes for tomorrow.

Services.title: Our Services
Services.subtitle: Comprehensive trading and logistics solutions designed for global trade efficiency.
Services.exportDesc: Comprehensive export operations of vehicles, trucks, bikes, machinery, and heavy equipment. We manage initial inspections, de-registration paperwork, and preparation for shipment.
Services.importDesc: Professional sourcing and import brokerage of high-quality products from trusted global suppliers. We help navigate trade rules, handle broker matching, and verify suppliers.
Services.vanningDesc: In-house secure cargo container loading (vanning) for vehicles, motorcycles, and machinery. We utilize high-strength lashings and custom securing techniques to ensure complete safety during transit.
Services.vanningStep1Desc: Pre-loading verification to plan optimal weight distribution.
Services.vanningStep2Desc: Lashing using high-tensile steel wire or heavy-duty straps.
Services.vanningStep3Desc: Detailed checks and official customs sealing of the cargo.
Services.shippingDesc: Ocean freight and logistics management tailored to your specific destination. We offer container shipping, Roll-on/Roll-off (Ro-Ro) transport, and flexible logistics packages.
Services.customsDesc: Complete support for customs documentation and regulatory compliance. We guide you through necessary paperwork, certifications, and trade formalities via our established partner networks.

Products.title: Handled Products
Products.subtitle: Explore the range of vehicles and industrial machinery we regularly ship and export.
Products.vehiclesDesc: Sedans, SUVs, and luxury vehicles. Prepared, inspected, and shipped with utmost care to avoid any cosmetic or mechanical damage during transit.
Products.trucksDesc: Light, medium, and heavy-duty trucks. We manage the unique height and weight requirements of large logistics vehicles, ensuring secure container loading or Ro-Ro booking.
Products.bikesDesc: Sports bikes, street bikes, and scooters. Standardized wooden crating or specialized vanning structures are used to pack multiple bikes securely in a single container.
Products.machineryDesc: Factory equipment, manufacturing lines, and specialized tools. We disassemble and secure delicate components using moisture protection and anti-rust packaging.
Products.heavyDesc: Construction excavators, loaders, rollers, and agricultural machinery. Handled by experienced operators using heavy-duty securing wires and flat-rack containers.
Products.vanningShippingDesc: Combined solutions for complex machinery lots, multi-product consignments, and bulk transport. We handle mixed container loads with structured packaging layouts.
Products.solutionsDesc: ORION GLOBAL specializes in preparing complex shipping manifests, mixed container packing, and Ro-Ro bookings. If your cargo requires wooden crating, heavy machinery strapping, or custom export certificates, we have in-house operators ready to help.
Products.complianceDesc: We check and verify supplier documentation to prevent custom border rejection at Thailand, Myanmar, and other Asian ports.

Strengths.item1Desc: Connecting manufacturers and suppliers directly to international markets, including Thailand and Myanmar.
Strengths.item2Desc: Building long-term business relationships based on professional integrity and transparent operations.
Strengths.item3Desc: Experienced in-house cargo vanning, guaranteeing maximum safety and cargo securing during transport.
Strengths.item4Desc: A highly trained logistics team with years of experience in custom documentation and heavy machinery transport.
Strengths.item5Desc: Custom logistics workflows that minimize costs, optimize loading layouts, and accelerate delivery schedules.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.subtitle: Please read these Terms of Service carefully before using our services.
Terms.sec1Text: By accessing or using the services provided by ORION GLOBAL, you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service and all applicable trade laws and regulations.
Terms.sec2Text: ORION GLOBAL offers international logistics services including vehicle and machinery exports, imports, container loading (vanning), ocean freight shipping, and customs clearance support.
Terms.sec3Text: All quotations, shipping dates, and rates provided on this website are estimates based on initial product parameters and market conditions. Final rates are subject to verification and contract terms.
Terms.sec4Text: ORION GLOBAL is not liable for transport delays, custom clearance holds, or logistics bottlenecks caused by force majeure events, administrative rules, or border inspections.
Terms.sec5Text: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Japan (our headquarters location), without regard to its conflict of law principles.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.subtitle: Your privacy is important to us. Learn how we handle your personal data.
Privacy.sec1Text: We collect information you submit via our email form, including your name, email address, phone number, company name, destination country, and any uploaded cargo manifest files.
Privacy.sec2Text: We use the collected information solely to process shipping inquiries, prepare quotations, coordinate logistics operations, and communicate updates about your cargo.
Privacy.sec3Text: We do not sell or trade your personal data. We share your information only with trusted third parties (such as ocean shipping lines and local custom brokers) necessary to execute your logistics services.
Privacy.sec4Text: Our website may use cookies to improve user experience and compile aggregated site performance analytics.
Privacy.sec5Text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to request data deletion, please contact us at info@orionglobal.jp.
